creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Expect has been updated to version 5.31, NIST still don't use
	version numbers for their tarballs.

	Pointed out by:  bento

Fix: Apply following patch to take expect to version 5.31,
	say goodbye to a.out/elf hackery, and depend on tcl/tk 8.2
	instead of 8.0

Version:	5.30 -> 5.31
Changes:	Makefile files/md5 patches/patch-aa pkg/PLIST
Adds:		NONE
Removes:	NONE

cvs diff: Diffing .
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd lang/expect; make
